findings.title: Repository has secret-like patterns requiring manual validation and possible rotation
findings.business_impact: Potential impact on Starlim ERP confidentiality, tenant isolation, financial integrity or operational continuity.
findings.description: Repository has secret-like patterns requiring manual validation and possible rotation
findings.precondition: Repository or low-volume read-only production access
findings.evidence: Candidate locations listed without values in secret-scan-report.md.
reproduction_steps_sanitized: Review generated report; do not print secrets or run destructive tests
findings.actual_result: Candidate locations listed without values in secret-scan-report.md.
findings.root_cause: Configuration/code gap or unavailable safe test environment
findings.recommended_solution: Apply local patch or roadmap action and retest in preview before production rollout.
findings.patch_applied_or_proposed: No values changed; rotate confirmed secrets through providers.
findings.residual_risk: Requires deploy/retest or staging where noted
findings.rollback_plan: Revert local branch changes; no production state changed

findings.title: Writable E2E testing blocked without staging/test tenant
findings.business_impact: Potential impact on Starlim ERP confidentiality, tenant isolation, financial integrity or operational continuity.
findings.description: Writable E2E testing blocked without staging/test tenant
findings.precondition: Repository or low-volume read-only production access
findings.evidence: Production stayed read-only; no safe writable tenant was provided.
reproduction_steps_sanitized: Review generated report; do not print secrets or run destructive tests
findings.actual_result: Production stayed read-only; no safe writable tenant was provided.
findings.root_cause: Configuration/code gap or unavailable safe test environment
findings.recommended_solution: Apply local patch or roadmap action and retest in preview before production rollout.
findings.patch_applied_or_proposed: Created gated test structure; active flows must run only on staging/test.
findings.residual_risk: Requires deploy/retest or staging where noted
findings.rollback_plan: Revert local branch changes; no production state changed

findings.title: Local Windows Vercel build is blocked by vercel-php path handling
findings.business_impact: Potential impact on Starlim ERP confidentiality, tenant isolation, financial integrity or operational continuity.
findings.description: Local Windows Vercel build is blocked by vercel-php path handling
findings.precondition: Repository or low-volume read-only production access
findings.evidence: vercel-php receives Windows-style php\php paths from @libphp but expects php/php during local build. Cloud deployments for project star-lim are READY.
reproduction_steps_sanitized: Review generated report; do not print secrets or run destructive tests
findings.actual_result: vercel-php receives Windows-style php\php paths from @libphp but expects php/php during local build. Cloud deployments for project star-lim are READY.
findings.root_cause: Configuration/code gap or unavailable safe test environment
findings.recommended_solution: Apply local patch or roadmap action and retest in preview before production rollout.
findings.patch_applied_or_proposed: Run the release build in Vercel cloud or Linux/WSL; do not treat this Windows local builder bug as an application code failure.
findings.residual_risk: Requires deploy/retest or staging where noted
findings.rollback_plan: Revert local branch changes; no production state changed

checks.control: Session ID regenerated on successful login
Central DB-backed session bootstrap covers entrypoints
checks.expected: only wrapper starts native PHP sessions and reapplies tenant context

checks.control: No DB exception detail returned to browser
Shared guard initializes session and denies anonymous users
checks.expected: anonymous protected routes redirect through centralized session bootstrap
